Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elder War]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor wore his current armor during the Elder War.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Elder War is a historical event.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Elder War involved Great Elders fighting in human bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — A second Elder War is a potential consequence of Jerri's decision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Elder War occurred in the past.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Regents have appeared five or six times since the Elder War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The death of the Emperor is considered a major tragedy since the Elder War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Elder War was a conflict during which the greatest warriors of humanity trapped the Great Elder.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
